patch.value:
Symptom (bug class 4): on `pm list-all` failure the command `return {error}` which exits 0; also the human chart was written to stdout even under --json, corrupting JSON output.
Repro: `pm gantt --json` (chart text preceded the JSON object, unparseable); failure path could not be made non-zero.
Expected: non-zero exit on fetch/parse failure; clean JSON under --json.
Fix: throw Error on spawn failure and on JSON.parse failure; guard process.stdout.write(chart) behind !ctx.global?.json (chart still returned in result). Verified: `pm gantt --json` now parses directly, exit 0 on success.
gantt: returns {error} (exit 0) on fetch failure + pollutes --json stdout
